array.string: cd '/Users/rajatsingh/Downloads/S4 AI Agency/S4 AI LLC/Client Database/Island Boy Kreationz Food Truck & Catering' && /usr/bin/env node scripts/island-boy-gbp.mjs --sync-reviews --reply-unanswered >> logs/gbp-reviews.log 2>&1
